name: Three-Pepper Popcorn
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely ground 2 teaspoons Black pepper and 1/4 cup Hot pepper sauce with 2 tablespoons melted Butter.
2. In a large heavy pot, heat Corn oil and Olive oil over high heat until the oil smokes.
3. Add 1 kernel of Popping corn and heat until it pops.
4. Add split Garlic cloves and the rest of the Popping corn, cover the pot, and gently shake until the corn starts to pop.
5. Shake vigorously until popping subsides. Remove from heat.
6. Remove the garlic.
7. Toss the popcorn with minced Garlic, coarsely ground Black pepper, Salt, and the Mixture of Hot pepper sauce and melted Butter.
